title: dondia torreyana
intro: Dondia torreyana, also known as Hawaiian sandalwood or sandalwood tree, is a small to medium-sized evergreen tree native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dondia torreyana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Dondia torreyana can be prepared as a herbal tea, essential oil, or infused oil, which can be used topically or in aromatherapy to harness its medicinal properties.
